_comment: Trailing 12-month yield overrides for funds where Morningstar's MFsnapshot YieldHistory is empty (notably MAS-coded SG funds). Keyed by ISIN. source='fwd' rows are auto-refreshed by scripts/scrape-platform-yields.ts; source='manual' rows are edited by hand. Runtime in lib/portfolio-performance.ts consults this file when the Morningstar snapshot returns null yield.

SG9999002083.note: FSSA Dividend Advantage Fund SGD Dis — scraped from FWD fund-report Dividends section ('12 mo Yield').

SG9999003826.note: Amova Singapore Dividend Equity Fund Dis SGD — TMLS surfaces only individual payouts, not a TTM yield. Annualised from latest ex-div 2 Jun 2026 (SGD 0.008) on NAV 1.9284, assuming semi-annual distribution: (0.008 × 2) / 1.9284 ≈ 0.83%. Revise once a second 2026 payout is observed or the fund's distribution frequency is confirmed.
